# GitHub Copilot Instructions

All agent instructions are in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) at the repository root.

GitHub Copilot reads `AGENTS.md` natively. This file is kept for compatibility
with GitHub.com Copilot (PR reviews, web interface).

Path-specific `*.instructions.md` files in `.github/instructions/` provide
detailed guidance by file type and are applied automatically via `applyTo` frontmatter.
